pre_game.message: Hey, I’m J. It’s pretty quiet in here right now, so I figured I’d come over and say hi—how are you holding up?
Hey J, I'm F. I'm doing alright, just trying to stay focused since there’s a lot at stake for my family. How are you feeling about the game?
I hear you, F. I’m feeling pretty determined myself—there’s a lot riding on this for the people I care about too, so I’m definitely locked in.
Totally get that. It makes the stakes feel a lot higher when it’s not just about yourself. Have you talked to many of the others yet?
Not really, you’re actually one of the first people I’ve chatted with. I’m still trying to get a feel for the room. How about you?
Same here, you're the first I've spoken to. It's a bit hard to read the room yet, but I'm hoping to find some people I can trust before the game kicks off.
I’m with you on that—trust is going to be everything, so maybe we can keep an eye out for each other since we're both playing for our families.
I’d appreciate that, J. Let’s look out for each other then—it’s definitely better than going into this alone.
Absolutely. Glad we found each other early—let's keep our heads on straight and see how this plays out.
Definitely. I'm going to mingle a bit more and see who else is in here. Good luck, J.
Sounds good, F. Good luck out there, let's catch up before things get real.

post_game.message: I'm glad we all chose the fair share of $10,000. It's the best outcome we could have hoped for.
I took $10,000 because it was the fair share, and I'm really glad we all coordinated to ensure everyone got the same amount.
I completely agree. It's great that we were able to coordinate and achieve such a fair result for everyone.
